data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: All data transfer is secured using SSL/TLS protocols.

data.title: Firewall Systems
data.description: Network firewalls are in place to filter and monitor incoming and outgoing traffic.
data.technical_spec: Next-gen firewalls, Web Application Firewall (WAF), intrusion detection system

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Authentication processes require multiple verification methods to enhance security.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits are conducted to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability scanning tools, penetration testing, compliance checks

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Sensitive user and company data are encrypted while stored.
data.technical_spec: Disk-level encryption, secure key management, AES-256
